BIOL-301 FA2023 — also struggling, especially CLO 2 (genetic analysis = PLO 6)
BIOL-250 SP2024 — worsening (department starts discussing intervention)

program_outcomes._comment: Per-program PLO definitions + CLO mappings. The seeder creates PLOs, opens a draft mapping, links the CLOs listed under clo_mappings, then publishes the draft as mapping version 1. assessment_display_mode controls how the PLO dashboard badge renders (binary = S/U, percentage = 78%, both = S (78%)). plo_number is an integer (stored in program_outcomes.plo_number INTEGER) — the UI renders it as 'PLO-<n>'.

plos.description: Students will demonstrate mastery of the scientific method and experimental design in biological contexts.
Students will analyze and interpret cellular, molecular, and genetic processes.
Students will evaluate complex biological systems and communicate findings effectively.
Students will demonstrate ethical reasoning in biological research contexts.
plos._comment: Intentionally unmapped — demonstrates the 'no CLOs mapped yet' empty state in the PLO dashboard.

plos.description: Students will analyze molecular structure-function relationships in biological systems.
plos._comment: Covered by retired BIOL-250 CLO 3 (historical) and BIOL-251 CLO 3 (post-split). Shows decline→improvement arc.

plos.description: Students will apply genetic analysis techniques to interpret inheritance patterns.

plos.description: Students will demonstrate proficiency in biological laboratory techniques and quantitative data analysis.

plos.description: Students will identify, classify, and describe diversity across animal taxa.
Students will analyze animal behaviour, anatomy, and ecological relationships.
